decision_points.description: Inspect the full profile for the ambiguous candidate before committing to a follow-up.

citations.title: Open Targets: a platform for therapeutic target identification and validation
citations.tier_justification: Peer-reviewed target-validation platform paper supporting evidence-based profile inspection before prioritization.

decision_points.description: Use the pathway-state orthogonal readout to resolve a screen-versus-QC conflict.

citations.title: Perturb-Seq: Dissecting Molecular Circuits with Scalable Single-Cell RNA Profiling of Pooled Genetic Screens
citations.tier_justification: Peer-reviewed perturbation-screening paper motivating orthogonal readouts for resolving candidate-level effects.

decision_points.description: Keep the follow-up focused on the ambiguous target instead of branching into other candidates.

citations.title: Target validation in drug discovery
citations.tier_justification: Peer-reviewed methods chapter supporting focused validation of a single molecular target before broader commitment.
